title: LaTeX in Monday Docs
excerpt: We love using monday docs to document our processes. However, it would be awesome if monday docs could natively support LaTeX. Something along the lines of it recognizing the $ … $ tags for inline LaTeX expressions or th…

posts.author: jporter (Jordan Porter)
posts.cookedHtml: We love using monday docs to document our processes. However, it would be awesome if monday docs could natively support LaTeX. Something along the lines of it recognizing the $ … $ tags for inline LaTeX expressions or the $$ … $$ for multiline LaTeX expressions.

posts.author: Rafael_SicoobUni (Rafael_SicoobUni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, there are some paid applications that integrate the function you want.

(monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done)
